name: Glazed Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the Grape Nuts with 1/2 cup sugar, Maxwell House instant coffee, and cinnamon. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, 1 cup sugar, baking soda, Calumet baking powder, and salt.
3. Add the sour cream, butter, eggs, and vanilla to the dry ingredients. Mix at low speed with an electric mixer, then beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
4. Spread one third of the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan. Sprinkle half of the cereal mixture on top.
5. Repeat layers with remaining batter. Top with the rest of the cereal mixture.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Cool in the pan. Prepare the coffee glaze by gradually blending cooled brewed Maxwell House coffee into 1 1/2 cups sifted confectioners sugar.
8. Drizzle the glaze over the top of the cake.
Coffee Glaze:
Gradually blend 2 tablespoons cooled brewed Maxwell House coffee into 1 1/2 cups sifted confectioners sugar. Makes enough to glaze an 8 or 9 inch square cake or a 10 inch tube cake.
